bikes.name: X1 硬尾XC
bikes.sub: 入门级 · 29″ 铝合金硬尾
bikes.intro: X1 是山度的入门硬尾，把预算花在刀刃上：全车国产顶级配套，整车附「零件护照」，公开每颗零件的规格、品牌与山度加价率，拒绝虚高溢价。
features: 蓝图 T5 1×11 单盘系统，告别前拨，操作更简洁
SR SUNTOUR XCR 32 气压前叉，120mm 行程应对林道
山度几何™ S/M/L/XL 亚洲体型尺码，一上车就合身
整车 BOM 透明，公开加价率，拒绝虚高溢价

en.name: X1 Hardtail XC
en.intro: X1 is SANDO's entry hardtail — every yuan goes to the essentials: full Chinese top-tier spec, with a transparent "Parts Passport" that discloses each part's spec, brand and SANDO's markup rate — no inflated premium.
features: L-TWOO T5 1×11 single-ring — no front derailleur, simpler shifting
SR SUNTOUR XCR 32 air fork, 120mm travel for the trail
SANDO Geometry™ S/M/L/XL Asian-fit sizing — fits from the first ride
Fully transparent BOM — no inflated brand premium

bikes.name: T1 进阶硬尾
bikes.sub: 进阶级 · 29″ 内走线 + Flip Chip
bikes.intro: T1 在 X1 之上补齐进阶玩家要的：内走线车架、Flip Chip 几何微调、线控升降座管，下坡更自由。
features: 6066 铝合金内走线车架，外观更干净、防护更好
Flip Chip 几何芯片，6 档微调适应爬坡/下坡
蓝图 T7 1×12 十二速，齿比更绵密
线控升降座管 125mm 标配，站姿冲坡更稳

en.name: T1 Trail Hardtail
en.intro: T1 adds what trail riders want over X1: internally routed frame, Flip Chip geometry tuning, and a dropper post for more freedom on descents.
features: 6066 alloy frame with internal cable routing — cleaner look, better protection
Flip Chip geometry chip — 6-step tuning for climb/descent
L-TWOO T7 1×12 twelve-speed — tighter gear spacing
125mm cable-controlled dropper post standard — steadier standing climbs

bikes.name: F1 全避震

specs.v: 铝 四转点 全避震（平台待定）

bikes.intro: F1 是山度的竞赛级全避震，硬核通过性与轻量并举；悬挂采用公有四转点平台，暂缓自研与碳纤维版本。
features: 140/130mm 四转点全避震，竞赛级几何
Durolux 36 气压前叉 + 后胆，硬核路况也稳
蓝图 T9 碳导板 1×12，轻量且变速精准
TEKTRO Orion 四活塞刹车，长下坡不掉链子

en.name: F1 Full Suspension
en.intro: F1 is SANDO's race-grade full suspension — hardcore capability with low weight; uses a public four-bar suspension platform, with in-house development and the carbon version deferred.
features: Durolux 36 air fork + rear shock — stable on hardcore terrain
L-TWOO T9 carbon-guide 1×12 — light and precise
TEKTRO Orion four-piston brakes — no fade on long descents

hiking.name: Summit Trail 徒步鞋
hiking.desc: GORE-TEX 防水膜 + Vibram 大底，亚洲脚型楦头，重装山路稳定支撑。
hiking.intro: 重装山路的主力鞋，亚洲脚型楦头宽窄适中，长时间行走不挤脚。
features: GORE-TEX 防水透气膜，雨天不湿脚
Vibram 大底，湿滑岩石抓地稳
中帮包裹，崴脚风险更低
EVA 中底缓震，长途不累

en.name: Summit Trail Hiking Shoe
en.desc: GORE-TEX membrane + Vibram outsole, Asian-last upper, stable support for heavy trails.
en.intro: The workhorse for loaded mountain trails, with an Asian-last upper that's neither too narrow nor wide — no pinching on long hikes.
features: GORE-TEX waterproof-breathable membrane — dry feet in rain
Vibram outsole — grip on wet rock

hiking.name: Ridge 30 登山背包
hiking.desc: 航空铝架板负重系统，可拆卸顶包，防雨罩一体收纳。
hiking.intro: 一日重装或轻量过夜的黄金容量，架板把重量从肩膀转移到胯部。
features: 航空铝架板负重系统，护腰不伤背
可拆卸顶包，扩容更灵活

en.name: Ridge 30 Hiking Pack
en.desc: Aircraft-aluminium frame load system, removable top lid, integrated rain cover.
en.intro: The sweet-spot capacity for a day hike or light overnighter; the frame shifts weight from shoulders to hips.
features: Aircraft-aluminium frame load system — protects back
Integrated rain cover — ready for sudden rain
Ventilated back panel — no sweaty back

hiking.name: Pathfinder trekking 手杖
hiking.desc: 3K 碳纤维三节杖，EVA  ergonomic 握把，雪篮/泥篮双配件。
hiking.intro: 上坡借力、下坡护膝的轻量三节杖，碳纤本体几乎无感。
features: 3K 碳纤维本体，轻到忘记存在
EVA ergonomic 握把，久握不滑
雪篮/泥篮双配件，四季通用

en.name: Pathfinder Trekking Pole
en.desc: 3K carbon 3-section pole, EVA ergonomic grip, snow/mud baskets included.
en.intro: A lightweight 3-section pole that lends power uphill and protects knees downhill — the carbon body is barely noticeable.
features: 3K carbon shaft — light enough to forget
EVA ergonomic grip — no slip on long holds

hiking.name: Horizon 冲锋衣
hiking.desc: 20K 防水透气，全压胶接缝，腋下透气拉链，可收纳进自身口袋。
hiking.intro: 山地多变气候的硬壳防线，收纳进自身口袋，随取随穿。
features: 腋下透气拉链，运动不闷

en.name: Horizon Hardshell Jacket
en.desc: 20K waterproof-breathable, fully taped seams, pit zips, packs into its own pocket.
en.intro: The hardshell line against fickle mountain weather — packs into its own pocket, grab and wear anytime.
features: Pit zips — no stuffiness when moving

hiking.name: Compass Pro 多功能刀
hiking.desc: D2 工具钢一体刀身，G10 手柄，附打火棒槽与安全带割刀。
hiking.intro: 户外随身 EDC，危机时刻能割、能打火、能求救。
features: D2 工具钢一体刀身，硬度耐用

en.name: Compass Pro Multi-tool
en.desc: D2 tool-steel full-tang blade, G10 handle, with ferro-rod slot and seatbelt cutter.
en.intro: An everyday-carry for the outdoors — can cut, spark and signal in a crisis.
features: D2 tool-steel full-tang blade — hard and durable
G10 handle — no slip when wet

hiking.name: Signal 头灯
hiking.desc: 铝合金机身，泛/聚双光杯，Type-C 直充，IPX6 防雨。
hiking.intro: 夜行与营地的双手自由光源，泛光铺路、聚光探远。

en.name: Signal Headlamp
en.desc: Aluminium body, flood/spot dual reflectors, Type-C direct charge, IPX6 rainproof.
en.intro: A hands-free light for night trails and camp — flood lights the path, spot reaches far.
features: Type-C direct charge — no battery removal

camping.name: Basecamp 隧道帐
camping.desc: 20D 硅涂尼龙，铝合金帐杆，前厅可扩展，抗风 8 级。
camping.intro: 小队过夜的主力帐，隧道结构空间大、抗风强，前厅能做饭能储物。
features: 铝合金帐杆，抗风 8 级
前厅扩展，雨天也能活动

en.name: Basecamp Tunnel Tent
en.desc: 20D silicone-coated nylon, aluminium poles, extendable vestibule, wind-rated to level 8.
en.intro: The squad's overnighter tent — tunnel structure gives big space and wind resistance, vestibule for cooking and storage.
features: Extendable vestibule — activity even in rain

camping.name: Terra 睡袋
camping.desc: 850 蓬松度白鸭绒，信封/木乃伊双形态，压缩袋收纳。
camping.intro: 实测温标不虚标，木乃伊锁温、信封能当被，一袋两用。

en.name: Terra Sleeping Bag
en.desc: 850-fill white down, envelope/mummy dual form, compression sack.
en.intro: Real temperature rating, no fluff — mummy locks heat, envelope works as a quilt, two uses in one bag.
features: Real rated temp — no fake numbers

camping.name: Ember 焚火台
camping.desc: 不锈钢折叠结构，底部进风设计，配烧烤网与收纳袋。
camping.intro: 折叠收纳的营地灶台，底部进风让火烧得更旺更干净。

en.name: Ember Fire Pit
en.desc: Stainless folding structure, bottom air-intake design, with grill grate and carry bag.
en.intro: A foldable camp stove; bottom air-intake makes the fire burn hotter and cleaner.

camping.name: Lumen 营地灯
camping.desc: 磁吸底座 + 挂钩双固定，无极调光，20000mAh 可反向充电。
camping.intro: 营地照明兼充电宝，磁吸上帐顶、挂钩挂枝头都稳。

en.name: Lumen Camp Light
en.desc: Magnetic base + hook dual mount, stepless dimming, 20000mAh reverse-charge.
en.intro: Camp lighting and power bank in one — sticks to tent top via magnet or hangs on a branch.

camping.name: Rest 充气垫
camping.desc: TPU 贴合耐磨面料，菱形立衬锁温，内置脚踩充气泵。
camping.intro: 不带电泵的充气垫，脚踩三分钟充好，R值4.5 春秋冬通用。

en.name: Rest Air Mat
en.desc: TPU wear-resistant fabric, diamond baffles for warmth, built-in foot pump.
en.intro: An air mat with no separate pump — foot-pump in three minutes; R-value 4.5 for three-season use.

camping.name: Nomad 折叠桌椅
camping.desc: 航空铝椅架 + 600D 牛津布，可折叠收纳，承重 120kg。
camping.intro: 营地里的坐席，航空铝轻、牛津布耐，折叠塞包无负担。

en.name: Nomad Folding Chair & Table
en.desc: Aircraft-aluminium chair frame + 600D oxford cloth, foldable, 120kg load.
en.intro: Camp seating — light aircraft aluminium, durable oxford cloth, folds flat into the pack.

components.name: F1 全避震车架
components.spec: 铝 140/130mm 四转点（平台待定）

components.name: 蓝图 T7 指拨+后拨
久裕 29″ 铝合金轮组
components.spec: 培林花鼓 双抽铝圈

components.name: 久裕 碳/铝 轮组
VELO 人体工学坐垫
components.spec: 运动型 高回弹海绵

components.name: KS 线控升降座管 125mm
components.spec: 气压线控 标配 T1

components.name: KS 线控升降座管 150mm
components.spec: 气压线控 标配 F1

components.name: 轮组升级包
components.spec: 久裕碳圈轮组 + 真空胎

components.name: 变速升级包
components.spec: 蓝图 T9 全套替换

settings.heroSubtitle: SANDO 以国产顶级配套与供应链透明重塑山地车，terrain-x 以全场景装备覆盖徒步与露营。一个品牌矩阵，从山脚到营地，专业而诚实。

differentiators.title: 供应链透明
differentiators.desc: 每辆车附「零件护照」，公开全部零件的品牌、型号与山度加价率。

differentiators.title: 国产顶级配套
differentiators.desc: 全系蓝图 T 系列 + KMC + 日晖 + 久裕，国产 ≠ 低端。

differentiators.title: 模块化升级
differentiators.desc: 基础整车 + 轮组/变速/刹车升级包，标准化 Boost 148/110、BSA 接口。

differentiators.title: 山度几何™
differentiators.desc: 基于亚洲体型优化的 Asian Fit 几何，持续迭代形成技术资产。

differentiators.title: 社区共创
differentiators.desc: 车型配置社区投票 + 专业调校，每款车发布「配置征询帖」。

differentiators.title: terrain-x 全场景
differentiators.desc: 徒步 + 露营双线打通，从山脚到营地一套装备。

settings.communityNote: 每款车型的配置由社区投票决定。扫码进群，参与下一款 SANDO 的配置征询。
settings.manualNote: 每一辆 SANDO 整车都配有完整使用手册：出发前检查、安全骑行、尺寸适配、部件技术、保养周期与扭矩规格、尺码对照与车架零件号。

hq.name: SANDO × terrain-x 深圳总部
hq.addr: 深圳市龙华区龙华路粮食大院1栋
